overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character in a red jacket walking through a futuristic dystopian urban environment. The scene includes elevated highway structures, industrial smokestacks, digital billboards, and scattered pedestrians under bright midday sun. The camera follows the character smoothly through covered walkways, open intersections, and commercial sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated transit highway

events.description: exits the covered area under the elevated highway into open intersection with industrial backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the elevated highway toward a large digital billboard, passing parked cars on the left side

notable_agents.action: player character in red jacket and yellow pants walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overhead transit structure casting striped shadows on the ground
large vertical digital screen displaying advertisement with muscular figure and text BOTTOMS UP
thick industrial pillars supporting the elevated highway structure
green metal chain-link fence running along the right side of the walkway
several vehicles parked along the left curb under the elevated structure

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive elevated highway structure with concrete pillars and a green chain-link fence lining the walkway. The character walks toward a large digital billboard displaying an advertisement, with parked cars visible to the left. Around 8 seconds, the scene opens up as the character exits the covered area into a brighter, more open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with industrial smokestacks and traffic control

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, vehicles begin moving through intersection
character crosses the street and steps up onto the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: navigating across the multi-lane intersection, following the crosswalk markings while avoiding vehicles

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving through the intersection from left to right
person with red hair leaning against a concrete pillar on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall red and white striped industrial smokestacks emitting smoke in the background
horizontal traffic signal arm with illuminated lights extending over the street
orange rectangular street sign with text BENNETT mounted on a black pole
open-air concrete parking garage with multiple levels and palm trees nearby

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the elevated highway into a wide-open intersection dominated by industrial smokestacks in the distance. The camera crosses the asphalt crosswalk as the traffic light changes, passing a street sign reading BENNETT. A multi-story parking structure becomes prominent on the right, while vehicles pass through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with industrial buildings and utility infrastructure

events.description: character briefly stops to avoid pedestrian then continues walking forward
passing by blue and white commercial buildings with metal security shutters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past various pedestrians and storefronts, maintaining a consistent pace

notable_agents.action: man in dark clothing carrying a bag walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: low-rise commercial structures with metal security shutters and blue and white facades
wooden power poles with multiple crossbars and overhead wires
red and white striped concrete barriers separating the sidewalk from the street
tall modern street lamps with horizontal orange light bars

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a concrete sidewalk lined with commercial buildings on the right and road barriers on the left. The industrial smokestacks fade into the distance as the character passes utility poles and modern street lights. The parking structure from the previous segment recedes into the background as the character continues down the urban corridor, passing other pedestrians and storefronts with security shutters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shadowed depths of an elevated highway into a bright, expansive urban intersection and along a commercial corridor. It begins beneath massive concrete pillars and a green chain-link fence, moving past parked cars toward a large digital billboard. As the character exits the covered area, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the lighting brightens and industrial smokestacks dominate the distant skyline. The camera then crosses an asphalt crosswalk past a Bennett street sign and a multi-story parking structure before shifting toward a concrete sidewalk. Finally, the industrial backdrop recedes as the camera glides past utility poles, pedestrians, and storefronts with security shutters along a modern city street.
